title: Appliances, Functions, Storage, and Cloud Connectivity · Protocol Clinic: Net Cloud Service Deployment
summary: Design service paths across physical and virtual devices, private cloud networks, public services, and storage. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net cloud service deployment increment in a labeled hybrid-service path. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare public, private, hybrid and SaaS, PaaS, IaaS responsibility boundaries.
Choose internet, NAT, VPN, or dedicated cloud connectivity by direction, reachability, performance, and risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Predict Net Cloud Service Deployment
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: network appliances cloud. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed theory case derived from this module: network appliances cloud. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Before reading, predict which action preserves the Net Cloud Service Deployment contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compare public, private, hybrid and saas, paas, iaas responsibility boundaries.

content.text: Compare public, private, hybrid and SaaS, PaaS, IaaS responsibility boundaries. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Worked case pattern

A defensible solution applies Net Cloud Service Deployment, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of a labeled hybrid-service path while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Moving to IaaS transfers operating-system and network security responsibility to the provider. This fails the Net Cloud Service Deployment contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Build Net Cloud Service Deployment evidence
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-cloud-service-deployment-1hlbkd" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Cloud Service Deployment into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: net-cloud-service-deployment-1hlbkd
# hypothesis: [replace with one falsifiable probable cause]
# command: choose one safe read-only simulator command
# observation: [replace with the result that supports or rejects the hypothesis]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
